currentSummary.currentPlan: GSE-172 verified locally; npm 1.2.0 registry publication is accepted. Marketplace approval and other-host runtime evidence remain external-required.

currentSlice.outcome: Make the portable GSE entrypoint usable across sessions without relying on prior conversation history or inferring Host capability.
currentSlice.nextAction: Select the next independently verifiable functional Slice under the same top-level Plan Unit; keep external acceptance owner-gated.

residualRisks: Portable continuation and task admission remain advisory; they cannot create or dispatch a host task or complete a host Goal.
Registry publication is accepted for npm 1.2.0; marketplace approval, native slash-command evidence, and public acceptance remain separate claims.
Marketplace and other-host runtime gates remain pending and must be re-audited only after real evidence is attached.
The historical .gse/goal-map.md is a repository ledger and must not be copied into an active host goal.

riskArchive.risk: 0.1.1 is already published and immutable; release metadata changes must publish a new semver version.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-147 uses 0.1.2 as the publish target.

riskArchive.risk: Session sync records prove notification attempts and honest outcomes, not that another running session adopted the capability immediately.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-146 surfaces compactState.sessionSyncBoundary and CP21 so adoption is false unless an explicit adoption record exists.

riskArchive.risk: The final-form roadmap contract is not itself final-form completion; live claims still come from references/final-readiness.md and audit-final-readiness.mjs.
riskArchive.resolution: Preserved through /gse continue blockedGates and final-readiness claim boundary.

riskArchive.risk: The next implementation slice must reduce long prompt dependence through /gse continue hard preflight, not add more prose-only guidance.
riskArchive.resolution: Implemented by scripts/generate-continue-packet.mjs and /gse continue routing.

riskArchive.risk: Use /gse doctor and audit-public-acceptance-readiness.mjs as the source of truth for pending final-form public gates.
riskArchive.resolution: Integrated into continue packet ownerExternalGateSummary and blockedGates.

riskArchive.risk: The final-form plan could be interpreted as only the remaining owner/external release gates.
riskArchive.resolution: references/final-form-roadmap.md now contains Wave 1-5 execution plan and current gap list for local engineering and external evidence.

riskArchive.risk: Project guard automation is the next local engineering gap: repeated real-project lessons must become preflight guard items instead of reminder prose.
riskArchive.resolution: Implemented as soft project guard preflight through .gse/project-guards.md, audit-project-guards.mjs, scaffold generation, and /gse continue CP11.

riskArchive.risk: Evidence level granularity still needs sharper UI/browser/API/CI labels.
riskArchive.resolution: Implemented through evidenceLevel and requiredEvidenceLevel taxonomy, audit-evidence-levels.mjs, /gse continue CP12, and close gate CG09.

riskArchive.risk: Role and dispatch fallback packets need stronger default output and no-fake-dispatch checks.
riskArchive.resolution: Implemented through role-dispatch-fallback.md, role-fallback-packet.md, .gse/agents/role-fallback-packets.md, audit-role-dispatch-fallback.mjs, and /gse continue CP13.

riskArchive.risk: Downgraded evidence is now visible before continue/close, but each project decides whether a downgrade blocks close.
riskArchive.resolution: Preserved through evidenceLevel and requiredEvidenceLevel warnings.

riskArchive.risk: Use /gse doctor and audit-public-acceptance-readiness.mjs as the source of truth for current final-form external gates.
riskArchive.resolution: Preserved as the public/external acceptance route while state repair handles local state/evidence drift.

riskArchive.risk: State/evidence repair is intentionally conservative: invalid JSON/JSONL is reported with concrete actions, not guessed or overwritten.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-115 implemented /gse repair and CP14; the remaining risk is now bounded as a deliberate repair policy.

riskArchive.risk: Automatic /gse repair writes are limited to reversible residual-risk compaction with .gse/backups; stale next-action drift remains a deliberate update.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-115 verified execute-gated residual-risk compaction and kept stale next-action repair deliberate.

riskArchive.risk: Learning promotion writes candidate-only .gse/learning-promotions.md output; guards, gates, templates, scripts, and skill updates still require deliberate follow-up changes.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-116 implemented candidate-only learning promotion; deliberate follow-up remains as normal slice work rather than an active blocker.

riskArchive.risk: Classification is deterministic and project-generic, not a human semantic review.
riskArchive.resolution: GSE-116 bounded classification as routing evidence and preserved human review for actual guard/gate/script mutations.

riskArchive.risk: Role fallback packets prove auditable sequential role boundaries, not real subagent execution.
riskArchive.resolution: Preserved by role fallback packets, no-fake-dispatch close gate, and host capability records; no longer needs default active risk display.

riskArchive.risk: AION and MuseFlow drill warnings are project-local readiness signals; GSE behavior must stay project-generic and must not mutate target projects during read-only drills.
riskArchive.resolution: Preserved by target hardening drill limits and maintenance cadence; no longer needs default active risk display.

riskArchive.risk: Installed sync evidence proves local source/package/installed-copy parity only at the time of the audit; it does not publish a package or prove host-native slash-command support.
riskArchive.resolution: Archived by GSE state repair to keep active residual risks compact.

riskArchive.risk: UI/browser evidence policy proves evidence labeling and downgrade surfacing only; target-project visible UI claims still need real browser or screenshot-backed proof.
riskArchive.resolution: Archived by GSE state repair to keep active residual risks compact.

riskArchive.risk: Maintenance snapshots are point-in-time freshness evidence; future capability edits must regenerate the snapshot, release bundle, and installed copy.
riskArchive.resolution: Archived by GSE state repair to keep active residual risks compact.
